name: 3dvr-agent
description: A local command-line system for: - building apps with AI - finding and closing real-world customers

scripts.test: node --check thomas-agent/node/send-outreach-email.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/outreach-draft.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/lead-crawl.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/lead-enrich.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/contact-form-core.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/contact-form-fill.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/form-adapters/generic-html-form.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/form-adapters/wordpress-contact-form-7.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/form-adapters/wix-contact-form.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/form-adapters/squarespace-form.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/yolo-agent.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/yolo-projects.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/self-yolo-workflows.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/agent-ops.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/autopilot.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/inbox-monitor.js && node --check thomas-agent/node/oauth-connection.js && bash -n install.sh && bash -n thomas-agent/scripts/3dvr && bash -n thomas-agent/scripts/ask-yolo-app && bash -n thomas-agent/scripts/ask-yolo-new-site && bash -n thomas-agent/scripts/ask-self-yolo-agent && bash -n thomas-agent/scripts/ask-self-yolo-loop && bash -n thomas-agent/scripts/ask-self-update-agent && bash -n thomas-agent/scripts/ask-rollback-agent && node --test test/*.test.js
